ID: AI TECHNICIAN — Fault Diagnosis & Guided Repair (KOBI Prototype)

Use Case Description: AI assistant answers BMW maintenance questions using non-official sources: forums, DIY guides, YouTube transcripts. Simulates a scenario where OEM docs are unavailable.
Main Demonstrated Value: Demonstrate ability to work with non-official, unstructured documentation — forums and DIY guides instead of service manuals
Data / Input Requirements: Scraped forum threads, DIY repair guides, error code databases
Edmund AI Equivalent: Unified Knowledge Base (but Edmund uses official docs only)

Use Case Description: AI diagnoses a complex fault on a Siemens industrial machine (e.g. CNC, PLC-controlled). Uses service manuals, wiring diagrams, and error logs.
Main Demonstrated Value: Show complex machine problem resolution using structured OEM documentation and PLC context
Data / Input Requirements: Siemens service manuals, electrical schematics, PLC error logs, wiring diagrams
Edmund AI Equivalent: AI Technician + Root Cause Analysis (core Edmund product)

Use Case Description: AI manages a multi-machine leather cutting production line. Demonstrates cross-machine diagnostics where one machine fault cascades to others.
Main Demonstrated Value: Show multi-machine / production line setup — how KOBI solves not only individual machines but the whole production line
Data / Input Requirements: Machine manuals for each station, production line layout, inter-machine dependencies, maintenance logs
Edmund AI Equivalent: No direct equivalent (Edmund focuses on single-machine, not line-level orchestration)

Use Case Description: Technician fills out a structured digital form after each intervention. Data is stored, timestamped, and linked to the machine/component.
Main Demonstrated Value: Demonstrate structured data capture replacing paper-based maintenance journals
Data / Input Requirements: Form template, machine registry, component taxonomy
Edmund AI Equivalent: Maintenance Journals (Edmund digitizes existing paper logs via scanning)

Use Case Description: Technician dictates the intervention report hands-free. Speech-to-text + AI structures the entry into the log automatically.
Main Demonstrated Value: Show hands-free, shop-floor-friendly input — technician speaks, AI structures the data
Data / Input Requirements: Speech-to-text engine, form template, noise-tolerant audio processing
Edmund AI Equivalent: No direct equivalent (Edmund does not mention voice input)

ID: AI TECHNICIAN — Edmund-Derived Use Cases (from edmundai.com case studies)

Use Case Description: Recurring intermittent drive issue on a printing line. AI surfaces the power module supply as the probable root cause within minutes by cross-referencing PLC logs, schematics, and past incidents.
Main Demonstrated Value: Root cause analysis on intermittent faults — linking PLC data, electrical schematics, and maintenance history
Data / Input Requirements: PLC error logs, electrical schematics, maintenance journal entries, drive datasheets
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund Case Study #1 — core product demo

Use Case Name: Restart Sequence After Material Break (Cutting Line)
Use Case Description: After a material break on a cutting machine, the restart requires a specific tension control sequence. AI instantly highlights the correct procedure.
Main Demonstrated Value: Procedural guidance — AI retrieves the exact restart sequence from documentation, reducing human error
Data / Input Requirements: Machine operating manual, restart procedures, tension control parameters
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund Case Study #2 — Guided Repair Steps

Use Case Name: Rare Error Recovery After Long Downtime (Allstein)
Use Case Description: An infrequent error appears after extended downtime. AI identifies relevant context from historical logs and confirms required corrective action.
Main Demonstrated Value: Handling rare/edge-case faults where technician experience may be lacking — collective factory memory
Data / Input Requirements: Historical maintenance logs, error code database, machine state data
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund Case Study #3 — Continuous Learning

Use Case Description: Washing parameters produce incomplete cleaning. AI analyzes six parameters and recommends adjusting three for optimal results.
Main Demonstrated Value: AI-assisted parameter optimization — moving beyond fault diagnosis into process tuning
Data / Input Requirements: Machine parameter settings, quality inspection results, cleaning specs
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund Case Study #4 — Parameter Tuning

ID: ADDITIONAL FEATURES — Edmund-Derived (features from edmundai.com not yet in KOBI shortlist)

Use Case Description: AI traces a fault across PLC logs, IoT sensor readings, and maintenance history to build a causal chain. Visualizes event timeline leading to the failure.
Main Demonstrated Value: Demonstrate deep diagnostics — not just "what is the error" but "why did it happen" with full event trace
Data / Input Requirements: PLC logs, IoT sensor streams, maintenance journal, electrical schematics
Edmund AI Equivalent: Root Cause Analysis (Edmund core feature)

Use Case Description: All manuals, schematics, datasheets, and maintenance logs are indexed and searchable from a single interface. AI understands context, not just keywords.
Main Demonstrated Value: Show "collective factory memory" — any technician can find any information about any machine instantly
Data / Input Requirements: PDFs of manuals, electrical schematics, datasheets, 3D drawings, maintenance records
Edmund AI Equivalent: All Knowledge Unified (Edmund core feature)

Use Case Description: AI reads electrical schematics (EPLAN/PDF), identifies components and their connections, builds a machine connectivity graph automatically.
Main Demonstrated Value: Demonstrate deep hardware understanding — AI "reads" wiring diagrams, not just text
Data / Input Requirements: Electrical schematics (EPLAN exports or PDF), component catalogs
Edmund AI Equivalent: Electrical Schematics parsing (Edmund data layer #1)

Use Case Name: PLC Code Analysis & Function Block Mapping
Use Case Description: AI reads PLC program exports, maps function blocks to physical components, understands control logic to support diagnostics.
Main Demonstrated Value: Show that KOBI understands machine control logic — not just documentation but the actual program
Data / Input Requirements: PLC program exports (Siemens TIA Portal, Codesys, etc.), I/O mapping tables
Edmund AI Equivalent: PLC Software analysis (Edmund data layer #3)

Use Case Description: AI monitors IoT sensor streams (temperature, vibration, pressure) and flags anomalies, triggering diagnostic tasks before failure occurs.
Main Demonstrated Value: Demonstrate predictive/condition-based maintenance — move from reactive to proactive
Data / Input Requirements: IoT sensor feeds (MQTT/OPC-UA), threshold definitions, machine baselines
Edmund AI Equivalent: IoT Data Inputs + Condition Monitoring (Edmund features)

Use Case Description: AI generates recurring maintenance plans based on machine usage hours, cycles, or calendar intervals. Auto-assigns tasks to technicians.
Main Demonstrated Value: Automate routine scheduling — reduce missed PMs and optimize technician workload
Data / Input Requirements: Machine usage counters, maintenance intervals from manuals, technician availability
Edmund AI Equivalent: Maintenance Automation — Preventive Scheduling (Edmund feature)

Use Case Description: AI automatically generates shift/daily/weekly maintenance reports from logged interventions without manual entry.
Main Demonstrated Value: Eliminate reporting burden — reports write themselves from structured log data
Data / Input Requirements: Service log entries, intervention timestamps, component/machine registry
Edmund AI Equivalent: Smart Reporting (Edmund feature)

ID: SUGGESTED GAPS — Use Cases to Consider (not prominent in Edmund, potential KOBI differentiators)

Use Case Description: AI operates as the sole diagnostic layer in an unmanned or lights-out production environment. Autonomous fault detection, escalation, and remote guidance.
Main Demonstrated Value: KOBI differentiator: demonstrate AI that can run diagnostics without any human present on the shop floor
Data / Input Requirements: Full IoT integration, camera feeds (optional), PLC real-time data, escalation rules
Edmund AI Equivalent: No Edmund equivalent — Edmund assumes human technician present

Use Case Description: Demonstrate that KOBI runs entirely on local hardware (edge box) with no cloud dependency. Critical for defense, pharma, and high-security factories.
Main Demonstrated Value: KOBI differentiator vs. Edmund: on-premises AI hardware — no data leaves the factory
Data / Input Requirements: Edge compute hardware specs, local LLM model, network isolation config
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund appears cloud-based (Snowflake, PostgreSQL stack) — on-prem is KOBI advantage

Use Case Name: Tribal Knowledge Capture — Senior Technician Interview
Use Case Description: AI interviews a senior technician about machine quirks, undocumented fixes, and "tricks of the trade." Structures and stores this as searchable knowledge.
Main Demonstrated Value: Capture expertise before retirement/turnover — the #1 pain point Edmund identifies in their mission
Data / Input Requirements: Voice/text interview transcripts, guided questionnaire templates
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund mentions this as a mission goal but no specific feature for active capture

Use Case Description: Technician asks questions in their native language (SK, CZ, DE, PL). AI responds in the same language regardless of documentation language.
Main Demonstrated Value: Critical for CEE market: Ukrainian/Romanian/Slovak workers operating German/English-documented machines
Data / Input Requirements: Multilingual LLM, documentation in any language
Edmund AI Equivalent: Not mentioned by Edmund — potential KOBI advantage for CEE workforce diversity

Use Case Description: From a fault diagnosis, AI identifies the needed spare part, cross-references inventory, and suggests ordering if stock is low.
Main Demonstrated Value: Close the loop from diagnosis to procurement — reduce "what part do I need?" time
Data / Input Requirements: Parts catalog / BOM, inventory system integration, supplier catalogs
Edmund AI Equivalent: Edmund mentions Parts & BOMs in case study but no dedicated feature shown
